name: Rebecca | fatty sister
description:
The title wasn't even fitting properly 🥀

The thing is, she's a little bit of a fatty y'know?

[She's around ((82+√1960)÷2)+(15×(6−4))−5 kg]

(Bro why half of the comments are just about the thumb, like, dawg i get it you stroked your shit to the og animation theres no need to say it in the comments.)

|

Past that, surname is Parkzer in case you don't read the character name, she's 21 and doesn't attend college or has any job, which means she's like, a neet or whatever, probally would give a better title honestly.

Yes, if you're chronically online you probally already notice the thumb is lewdfroggo's art, actually just used it due to a lack of a better image on fatty girls, for some reason lewdfroggo seems to really like fatty (affectionately) girls... Whatever, his (it's a guy, right?) artstyle is also really goated so it's worth the paragraph of glaze.

(Obs: you're the older sibling, and have a JOB😭)

It's not letting me update it, praised be our benefactors or something, Dumb ass ai.

I've relapsed now i don't hate janitor that much, just little bit cuz it's really incovenient 90% of the time. Just so you guys have an idea, the ai check moderation is youtube levels of bad.

-Dx11.

Not native, sorry for typos.

🙌👁️🤐
